personalized_recommendations.description: Personalized movie recommendations for a user
personalized_recommendations.sql: select title, year, genre, score, reason from movie_recommendations_for_user where user_id = %s order by score desc limit %s

similar_movies.description: Movies similar to a given title
similar_movies.sql: select recommended_title, year, genre, similarity_score from similar_movies where source_title = %s order by similarity_score desc limit %s

recommendations_by_genre.sql: select title, year, score from genre_recommendations where genre = %s order by score desc limit %s

recommendations_by_mood.sql: select title, year, mood, score from mood_recommendations where mood = %s order by score desc limit %s

family_movie_night.sql: select title, year, age_group, score from family_movie_recommendations where age_group = %s order by score desc limit %s

top_movies_around_date.description: Top movies around a specific date (±14 days), ranked with triangular weighting (best for Xmas-style prompts)
top_movies_around_date.sql: select movie_title, weighted_clickouts_29d, window_rank, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.mart_movie_popularity_rolling_29d_top20 where app_locale = %s and anchor_date = %s and genre_bucket = %s order by window_rank limit %s

top_movies_around_date_by_keyword.description: Top movies around a date matching a keyword (simple text match on title/description)
top_movies_around_date_by_keyword.sql: select movie_title, weighted_clickouts_29d, window_rank, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.mart_movie_popularity_rolling_29d_top20 where app_locale = %s and anchor_date = %s and genre_bucket = '__all__' and (movie_title ilike '%%' || %s || '%%' or short_description ilike '%%' || %s || '%%' or object_text_short_description ilike '%%' || %s || '%%' or genres ilike '%%' || %s || '%%') order by weighted_clickouts_29d desc limit %s

daily_trending_movies.description: Daily trending movies for a specific day (top 50 per day/market, unweighted)
daily_trending_movies.sql: select movie_title, clickouts, daily_rank, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.mart_movie_popularity_daily_top50 where app_locale = %s and event_date = %s order by daily_rank limit %s

movie_details_by_object_id.description: Fetch movie details (description, poster, external URLs) by JustWatch object_id (tm...)
movie_details_by_object_id.sql: select object_id, title as movie_title, original_title, translated_title, release_year, imdb_score, short_description, object_text_short_description, poster_jw, url_imdb, url_tmdb from marts.dim_titles where object_id = %s and object_type = 'movie' limit 1

top_providers_in_date_window.description: Top streaming providers by clickouts in a date window (useful for 'where are people watching around Xmas?')
top_providers_in_date_window.sql: select p.clear_name as provider_name, c.clickout_monetization_type as monetization_type, count(*) as clickouts from marts.fct_clickouts c join marts.dim_providers p on c.clickout_provider_id = p.id where c.app_locale = %s and c.event_date between %s and %s group by 1, 2 order by clickouts desc limit %s
